description_long: This object is a large, cylindrical traffic barrel commonly used for roadwork and urban traffic control. It features alternating wide orange and white reflective bands, with three orange bands and two white bands wrapping horizontally around the body. The top section is capped with a flat, slightly domed lid that includes a rectangular handle for easy lifting and placement. The base is wide, octagonal, and dark gray, likely made of heavy rubber or plastic to provide stability and prevent tipping. The surface shows signs of weathering and dirt, especially on the orange bands and the base, indicating outdoor use. No logos or text are visible, and the overall condition appears lightly used with some scuff marks and grime.
description: A large, cylindrical orange-and-white traffic barrel with a handle on top and a wide, weighted octagonal base. The surface is weathered and dirty, with no visible markings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the handle on top, three orange bands, two white reflective bands, and the full octagonal base.
description_view_1: Side view with the handle edge-on, highlighting the cylindrical shape and the alternating color bands.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with the handle visible and the same band pattern; base details are clear.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the handle edge-on, showing the same color bands and a clear view of the textured base.
attribute_reflective_stripes: Two wide, horizontal white reflective stripes are present, one near the top and one near the middle, each spanning the full circumference.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is flat and solid with a slightly domed surface, colored orange, and features a rectangular handle integrated into the top.
attribute_base_design: The base is wide, octagonal, and thick, made of dark gray or black rubber or plastic, providing stability and weight; it has a textured, slightly uneven surface.
attribute_presence_of_logos_or_markings: No logos, text, or other markings are visible on the object.
attribute_condition: Lightly used, with visible dirt, scuff marks, and some surface wear, but no major damage.
